overall.description: Gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character traversing a stormy Gotham City rooftop at night. The scene features gothic architecture, neon signage, and a large digital billboard before opening up to a panoramic view of the city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop with broadcast tower and digital billboard

events.description: Batman begins walking forward along the rooftop away from the broadcast tower

agents.ego_description: Batman stands near the broadcast tower observing the screen, then begins walking steadily along the rooftop edge

entered.detail: tall dark structure with antennae and a large digital screen mounted on the side
illuminated screen displaying 'BATMAN: GOTHAM'S MOST WANTED?' with Batman's cowl image
glowing orange bat symbol mounted on the side of the tower structure
tall pointed spire visible in the distant city skyline against the storm clouds

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on a rooftop next to a large broadcast tower displaying a digital billboard about Gotham's most wanted. The stormy night sky looms overhead with gothic architecture visible in the distance. Batman begins walking forward along the rooftop edge, passing the glowing neon bat symbol.

events.description: passes the broadcast tower revealing open panoramic view of the gothic cityscape

agents.ego_description: Batman walks steadily along the rooftop edge surveying the sprawling gothic cityscape and neon-lit buildings below

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated clock face visible among the skyline
illuminated signage displaying 'LOCAL NEWS' in bright neon colors
smokestacks and industrial structures silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Moving past the broadcast tower, the view opens to a sweeping vista of Gotham's gothic skyline illuminated by neon signs against the stormy night sky. The camera follows Batman as he continues walking along the elevated rooftop edge, with industrial chimneys and a clock tower visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in the claustrophobic proximity of a rooftop broadcast tower and expands into a sweeping panoramic view of the Gotham City skyline. It begins with Batman standing beside a digital billboard of the city's most wanted, moving forward along the rooftop edge past a glowing neon bat symbol under a stormy night sky. As the camera passes the broadcast tower, the narrow perspective opens up to reveal a vast vista of gothic architecture and neon signage. The scene then shifts to a wider scale, following Batman as he continues his walk along the elevated ledge while industrial chimneys and a distant clock tower emerge from the gloom.
